diary_entries.entry: Another year. Solar flare disrupts electronics. The colony feels hopeful. My hoarding grows stronger.
Population: 27. Solar flare disrupts electronics. I spent the year on sabotage. Closest to Selene.
Another year. Solar flare disrupts electronics. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 57): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
